panels.title: Memory Working Set by Service Namespace

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, pod, container) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace",pod=~"$pod",container!="",container!="POD",pod!="",image!=""}) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace, pod, container) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"$namespace",pod=~"$pod",resource="memory",unit="byte",container!=""}), 1)

sum by (namespace, pod, container) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace=~"$namespace",pod=~"$pod",container!="",container!="POD",pod!="",image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (namespace, pod, container) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace=~"$namespace",pod=~"$pod",container!="",container!="POD",pod!="",image!=""}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)
